catalog.form.credit_limit_required_warni: Select a target limit that this credit pack will increase.
catalog.form.credit_target_description: Select which limit this credit pack will increase and the amount of credits.
catalog.form.feature_required_warning: Select at least one feature to enable.
catalog.form.features_enabled_descriptio: Select features that will be enabled when this addon is active.
catalog.form.limit_increment_description: Select a system limit this addon will increase when purchased.
catalog.form.limit_required_warning: Select a target limit for this quota addon.
catalog.form.pricing_onetime_hint: Set the one-time purchase price and validity period.
catalog.form.pricing_recurring_hint: Set monthly and yearly subscription prices in cents.
catalog.form.type_description: Choose the addon type. This determines what fields are available and how the addon works.
catalog.form.type_hint_credit: Credit addons are one-time purchases with a validity period. Configure the target limit, amount, price and validity below.
catalog.form.type_hint_feature: Feature addons unlock functionality that is not available in the base plan. Select the features this addon enables.
catalog.form.type_hint_metered: Metered addons track usage and charge based on consumption. Configure the unit tracking below.
catalog.form.type_hint_quota: Quota addons increase a plan limit (e.g., storage, users, projects). Configure the target limit and increment value below.
